name: Multithreading and Concurrency
description: Java multithreading concepts, concurrency mechanisms, thread safety, and synchronization techniques.

questions.title: What is the difference between a process and a thread in Java?
How do you create and start a thread in Java?
What is the purpose of the Runnable interface and how does it compare to extending the Thread class?
What are some common methods provided by the Thread class?
What is the difference between sleep() and wait() in Java?
What is synchronization in Java and why is it important?
Explain deadlock in Java. How can it be prevented?
What is volatility in Java? How does the volatile keyword work?
What is the difference between Callable and Runnable interfaces?
Explain the Executor framework in Java. Why is it preferred over manually creating threads?
Explain the Future interface in Java. How is it used?
Explain synchronized blocks vs synchronized methods in Java.
Explain thread safety in Java. How can you ensure it?
Explain concurrent collections in Java. Why are they important?
Explain atomic classes in Java. When should you use them?
Explain locks in Java. How do they differ from synchronized blocks?
Explain condition variables in Java. How are they used?
Explain the Fork/Join framework in Java. When should it be used?
Explain CompletableFuture in Java. How does it improve asynchronous programming?
